title: Digital Scarcity
description: Digital scarcity is the ability to make digital units costly to forge and impossible to validly spend twice under shared rules. Bitcoin's breakthrough is combining cryptography, networking, and consensus to enforce that scarcity.

resources.title: Bitcoin Whitepaper PDF
resources.notes: Primary source for digital cash design and double-spend resistance.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Block Chain
resources.notes: Mechanics of blocks, confirmation, and chain selection.

resources.title: Double-spending
resources.notes: General framing of digital scarcity constraints and attacks.
